rationale: stress-matrix.sh implements both rows with HEIMQ_STORAGE_* env vars, prints clear SKIPPED for the postgres row when POSTGRES_URL is unset, and a new optional CI workflow brings up a postgres service container. All AC items satisfied.

findings.summary: Files live under heimq/ subdir (heimq/scripts/, heimq/docs/) rather than the bead's repo-root paths; matches existing repo layout.
CI job is continue-on-error so backend-matrix regressions surface but do not block the main gate — consistent with the 'optional' wording in AC.
